title: astragalus kuhitangi
intro: Astragalus kuhitangi, also known as kawakawa or New Zealand pepper tree, is a native New Zealand plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Astragalus kuhitangi include reducing pain and inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although modern preparations may also involve extraction of its bioactive compounds.
